about.label: Who we are
about.title: PALME IVOIRE - Palm Oil Processing Specialist
about.body: PALME IVOIRE is a palm oil processor based in the heart of Ivory Coast. We buy palm fruit bunches from local farmers and transform them into premium crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel oil (PKO). Thanks to our expertise acquired from Malaysian industry leaders, we guarantee exceptional quality for all our clients.

items.title: Lasting Partnership
items.desc: We support our suppliers with technical assistance to improve their yields. Together, we build a strong supply chain.

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: Every drop of oil we process meets the most stringent quality standards. Our process guarantees unmatched purity and excellence.

items.title: Fair Prices
items.desc: We offer fair prices to our supplier farmers with fast and transparent payment. Their success is our success.

items.title: Malaysian Expertise
items.desc: Technology and know-how acquired from industry leaders in Malaysia

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: CPO and PKO complying with the strictest international standards

items.title: Sustainable Processing
items.desc: Treatment fluids naturally processed in our facilities

items.title: Local Partnership
items.desc: Direct support to 1500+ palm producers in the region

items.title: CHPH Certified
items.desc: Official certification as responsible palm processor - our first major certification

items.title: Complete Traceability
items.desc: End-to-end traceability system ensuring the quality and authenticity of our products

items.text: PALME IVOIRE offers us the best prices and technical support. Their team helps us improve our production. It's a true partnership, not just a business relationship.
items.author: Kofi Mensah

items.text: The quality of their CPO and PKO is exceptional. Our international customers are very satisfied. PALME IVOIRE has become our trusted supplier.
items.author: Sophie Bernard

items.text: Their commitment to sustainability and responsible fluid treatment is remarkable. It's rare to find in Africa a company that truly cares about the environment.
items.author: Dr. Amara Sow

contact.label: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Connect with us to learn more about our CPO/PKO products and community development initiatives.

about.title: About | Palme Ivoire
about.meta: Discover Palme Ivoire's story, mission and team — an Ivorian palm oil processor combining Malaysian expertise with local roots, based in Guitry.

hero.title: PALME IVOIRE: Excellence in Palm Oil Production
hero.subtitle: Since 2021, we connect local farmers to international markets by producing premium oils from palm fruit bunches.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Transform with Excellence, Impact Positively
mission.body: PALME IVOIRE was born from a clear vision: create a palm value chain that benefits everyone. By purchasing palm fruit bunches directly from Ivorian farmers, producing them to the highest standards, we build a fairer and more sustainable economy.

highlights.title: The Foundation
highlights.desc: Creation of PALME IVOIRE with the vision to be the leading palm processor in Ivory Coast, using Malaysian expertise.

highlights.title: Construction & Certification
highlights.desc: Installation of a state-of-the-art production facility in Abidjan equipped with cutting-edge production technology. Achieved CHPH certification and international standards compliance.

highlights.title: Strategic Partnerships
highlights.desc: Established contracts with 1,500+ local producers. First sales to French, Swiss and Asian markets.

highlights.title: Growth & Impact
highlights.desc: Reached 250,000+ tons processed annually. Expanded product portfolio: Premium CPO, Standard PKO, Foodgrade CPO.

items.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
items.desc: State-of-the-art processing equipment imported from Malaysia, global leader in palm processing. Optimized process for consistent quality and energy efficiency.

items.title: Experienced Team
items.desc: 150+ technicians, engineers and managers trained to international standards. Our teams combine Malaysian expertise with Ivorian field knowledge.

items.title: Rigorous Quality Control
items.desc: Modern control laboratory with testing at every stage. Complete traceability from palm bunch to finished marketed product.

items.title: Integrated Sustainability
items.desc: Ecological treatment of residual fluids, energy recovery, waste minimization. Certified sustainable and responsible processing.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: From Palm Bunch to Produced Oil

steps.title: Local Sourcing
steps.desc: Direct source from 1,500+ palm producers. Fair prices and quick payment. Free technical support to improve harvest quality.

steps.title: Reception & Sorting
steps.desc: Inspection of bunches at reception. Quality and humidity assessment. Storage in optimal conditions.

steps.title: Sterilization
steps.desc: Thermal treatment of bunches to optimize yield. Enzyme denaturation to preserve oil quality.

steps.title: Crushing & Extraction
steps.desc: Oil separation from kernels. Recovery of both CPO (crude palm oil) and nuts for PKO (palm kernel oil).

steps.title: Purification
steps.desc: Filtration and centrifugation to remove impurities. Parameter adjustment: acidity, color, odor per our standards.

steps.title: Packaging & Delivery
steps.desc: Filling in tanks or drums per orders. Final compliance testing. Secure delivery.

stats.label: Farmers Supported
stats.desc: Regular income and fair prices for local producers

stats.label: Jobs Created
stats.desc: Direct and indirect positions in Abidjan region

stats.label: Tons/year
stats.desc: Processing capacity to serve global markets

stats.label: Customer Countries
stats.desc: Sales to cosmetics, food and chemical industries

items.title: Quality Excellence
items.desc: Zero compromise on quality. Every drop of oil must exceed the expectations of the world's most demanding customers.

items.title: Economic Equity
items.desc: Fair prices, complete transparency, quick payment. Farmers are our partners, not our suppliers.

items.title: Environmental Responsibility
items.desc: Zero waste, ecological residue treatment, resource preservation. A sustainable palm sector for future generations.

items.title: Local Contribution
items.desc: Local hiring, continuous training, NGO partnerships. Our success must benefit Ivorian communities.

cta.label: Ready to Work with Us?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a palm producer, B2B buyer or potential partner, we'd love to explore opportunities together.

services.title: Services | Palme Ivoire
services.meta: Palm fruit bunch purchasing, CPO & PKO production, distribution, and farmer support. Palme Ivoire covers the full palm oil value chain in Ivory Coast.
services.subtitle: Discover our palm oil production and processing services, our commitment to sustainability and our positive impact on local communities.

hero.title: A Complete Palm Oil Production Chain
hero.subtitle: From responsible sourcing of palm fruit bunches to distribution of certified premium oils.

items.title: Sourcing of Palm Fruit Bunches
items.desc: Direct and responsible purchasing from 1,500+ local producers. Our agents are on the ground to identify the best harvests and ensure quality from the source.

items.title: Oil Production
items.desc: Processing bunches with our state-of-the-art facilities. Cutting-edge Malaysian technology to extract CPO and PKO with optimal yield and quality.

items.title: Quality Control and Certifications
items.desc: Rigorous laboratory testing to international standards. CHPH, and complete traceability for our most demanding clients.

items.title: Logistics and Distribution
items.desc: Complete logistics management: packaging, transport, customs and secure delivery. Deadlines met, quality guaranteed.

items.title: Support for Producers
items.desc: Free technical training on good agricultural practices. Agronomic assistance, supply of selected inputs, support to increase yields.

items.title: Production Consulting
items.desc: Technical advice to optimize palm processing. Custom solutions to improve yields, quality and profitability of your production.

process.label: Our Approach
process.title: Integrated Service Process
process.description: Every project follows proven methodology that ensures transparency, quality and respect for deadlines.

steps.title: Evaluation
steps.desc: Initial audit of your needs, current standards and objectives.

steps.title: Planning
steps.desc: Design of a detailed plan adapted to your context.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: Implementation with our expert teams and continuous monitoring.

steps.title: Control
steps.desc: Regular quality checks and adjustments if necessary.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Delivery of product complying with agreed standards.

items.title: Combined Expertise
items.desc: Malaysian technical mastery + knowledge of Ivorian terrain = optimal solution

items.title: Competitive Pricing

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: Strict quality standards maintained: CPO < 2% acidity, 100% traceability

items.title: Complete Certification
items.desc: CHPH, , international standards — your most demanding clients will be satisfied

items.q: How can I become a palm bunch supplier?
items.a: Contact us via the form by selecting 'Become a supplier'. Our team will get back to you to discuss partnership terms.

items.q: What are your minimum order quantities?
items.a: We accept orders starting from 20 tons for CPO and 10 tons for PKO. Contact us for specific needs.

locations.title: Our Sites | Palme Ivoire
locations.meta: Discover our factories and warehouses in Ivory Coast: Guitry, Yopougon, and soon Lakota.
locations.heading: Our Factories & Warehouses
locations.subtitle: Discover our production and storage sites strategically located in Ivory Coast.

sites.name: Guitry Factory
sites.description: Our main palm oil processing plant. Equipped with modern Malaysian technology, it processes over 250,000 tons of palm fruit bunches per year.

sites.name: Yopougon Warehouse
sites.address: Yopougon Industrial Zone, Abidjan, Ivory Coast
sites.description: Our main warehouse located in Yopougon, Abidjan. Strategic point for storing and distributing our palm oil to the Port of Abidjan.

sites.name: Lakota Factory
sites.description: Our new factory currently under construction in Lakota. This expansion will allow us to increase our production capacity and better serve farmers in the region.

items.title: CPO Premium
items.desc: Superior quality crude palm oil. Low acidity (< 2%), clear color. Ideal for cosmetics and premium industries.

items.title: PKO Standard
items.desc: Palm kernel oil processed to international standards. Optimal fatty acid profile for industrial and food applications.

items.title: CPO Foodgrade
items.desc: Palm oil suitable for food applications. Certified sanitary processing and compliance with FSSC 22000 standards.
